children.text: My name is Timo Halla.
children.statement: 蒂莫·哈拉是作者的名字。
children.explanation: 是的，作者在第一句话中介绍了自己的名字。

children.text: I'm 13 years old.
children.statement: 蒂莫今年12岁。
children.explanation: 蒂莫说他13岁了。

children.text: I live with my parents in Helsinki, Finland.
children.cn: 我与父母住在芬兰赫尔辛基。
children.notes: Helsinki (赫尔辛基): Capital city of Finland. Finland (芬兰): A country in Northern Europe.
children.statement: 蒂莫和他的朋友住在芬兰。
children.explanation: 蒂莫和他的父母住在芬兰。

children.text: Now it's December.
children.statement: 现在是夏天。
children.explanation: 文章中明确提到现在是十二月，通常是冬季。

children.text: Every Tuesday, I usually get up at 7:40.
children.cn: 每个星期二，我通常在7:40起床。
children.notes: usually (通常): most of the time.
children.statement: 蒂莫每天都在7:40起床。
children.explanation: 蒂莫说他“每个星期二”通常在7:40起床，而不是每天。

children.text: I often listen to the news or music.
children.statement: 蒂莫从不听新闻或音乐。
children.explanation: 蒂莫说他“经常”听新闻或音乐。

children.text: After breakfast, I walk to school.
children.statement: 蒂莫早餐后坐公交车去学校。
children.explanation: 蒂莫说他早餐后“步行”去学校。

children.text: It's only a 10-minute walk.
children.statement: 蒂莫步行去学校需要半小时。
children.explanation: 文章中提到步行只需10分钟。

children.text: My school begins at 9:00.
children.statement: 蒂莫的学校在早上8点开始上课。
children.explanation: 蒂莫的学校在9:00开始上课。

children.text: There are 18 students in my class.
children.statement: 蒂莫的班级有20名学生。
children.explanation: 蒂莫的班级有18名学生。

children.text: Each lesson is 45 minutes long, and there's a break between lessons.
children.cn: 每节课45分钟，课间有休息时间。
children.notes: break (休息): a short period of time when you stop doing something.
children.statement: 每节课持续一小时，课间没有休息。
children.explanation: 每节课45分钟，并且课间有休息时间。

children.text: I have one Finnish lesson and two home economics lessons in the morning.
children.cn: 上午我有一节芬兰语课和两节家政课。
children.notes: Finnish (芬兰语): The language spoken in Finland. home economics (家政课): The study of managing a home and family life.
children.statement: 蒂莫上午有三节数学课。
children.explanation: 蒂莫上午有一节芬兰语课和两节家政课。
children.keywords: Finnish lesson, home economics lessons, morning

children.text: After that, I have lunch at 12:00.
children.statement: 蒂莫在下午1点吃午饭。
children.explanation: 蒂莫在12:00吃午饭。

children.text: The afternoon lessons begin at 12:30 and finish at 2:15.
children.cn: 下午的课程在12:30开始，2:15结束。
children.statement: 下午的课程在下午2点结束。
children.explanation: 下午的课程在2:15结束。

children.text: Then I go to my ice hockey club.
children.cn: 然后我去我的冰球俱乐部。
children.notes: ice hockey (冰球): A sport played on ice, where players use sticks to hit a puck into the opponent's goal.
children.statement: 蒂莫放学后去足球俱乐部。
children.explanation: 蒂莫放学后去冰球俱乐部。

children.text: I usually get home around 4:00.
children.statement: 蒂莫通常在下午5点到家。
children.explanation: 蒂莫通常在4:00左右到家。

children.text: It's already dark outside.
children.statement: 蒂莫到家时外面还是白天。
children.explanation: 文章中提到蒂莫到家时“外面已经天黑了”。

children.text: I often have dinner at 6:00.
children.statement: 蒂莫在晚上7点吃晚饭。
children.explanation: 蒂莫经常在6:00吃晚饭。

children.text: After that, I read with my parents for an hour.
children.cn: 之后，我与父母一起阅读一小时。
children.statement: 蒂莫晚饭后和朋友一起阅读。
children.explanation: 蒂莫晚饭后和“父母”一起阅读。

children.text: That's an important part of my everyday life.
children.cn: 那是我日常生活中重要的一部分。
children.notes: everyday life (日常生活): the normal, routine activities of a person's life.
children.statement: 阅读对蒂莫来说不重要。
children.explanation: 蒂莫说阅读是他日常生活中“重要的一部分”。

children.text: Then I prepare my schoolbag for the next day.
children.cn: 然后我为第二天准备书包。
children.notes: prepare (准备): to make something ready.
children.statement: 蒂莫在早上准备书包。
children.explanation: 蒂莫在晚上准备书包，为“第二天”做准备。

children.text: At 9:30, it's time for me to go to bed.
children.statement: 蒂莫在晚上10点睡觉。
children.explanation: 蒂莫在9:30睡觉。
